recommendations.title: Deathstroke: Knights & Dragons - The Movie
recommendations.overview: The assassin Deathstroke tries to save his family from the wrath of H.I.V.E. and the murderous Jackal.

recommendations.title: Trollhunters: Rise of the Titans
recommendations.overview: The Guardians of Arcadia reunite to battle the nefarious Arcane Order, who've reawakened the primordial Titans.
recommendations.director: Johane Matte, Andrew L. Schmidt, Francisco Ruiz Velasco

recommendations.title: Buzz Lightyear of Star Command: The Adventure Begins
recommendations.genres: Animation, Family, Comedy, Science Fiction, Adventure, TV Movie, Action
recommendations.overview: Buzz Lightyear must battle Emperor Zurg with the help of three hopefuls who insist on being his partners.

recommendations.title: Plankton: The Movie
recommendations.genres: Family, Comedy, Adventure, Animation, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: Plankton's tangled love story with his sentient computer wife goes sideways when she takes a stand — and decides to destroy the world without him.

recommendations.title: Next Gen
recommendations.genres: Animation, Action, Adventure, Comedy, Family, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: A friendship with a top-secret robot turns a lonely girl's life into a thrilling adventure as they take on bullies, evil bots and a scheming madman.

recommendations.title: Almost Home
recommendations.overview: A group of aliens searching for a new planet on which to make home, with little success. Promotional short for Dreamworks Animation's forthcoming feature, Home.

recommendations.title: Astro Kid
recommendations.overview: Terra Willy: Unexplored Planet — Upon the destruction of their ship, Willy is separated from his parents. He lands on a wild and unexplored planet and with the help of Buck, a survival robot, he will have to hold until the arrival of a rescue mission

recommendations.title: Nimona
recommendations.genres: Animation, Family, Adventure, Fantasy, Comedy, Action, Drama, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: A knight framed for a tragic crime teams with a scrappy, shape-shifting teen to prove his innocence.

recommendations.title: Robot Dreams
recommendations.overview: A lonely dog's friendship with his robot companion takes a sad turn when an unexpected malfunction forces him to abandon Robot at the beach. Will Dog ever meet Robot again?

recommendations.title: Battle for Terra
recommendations.overview: A peaceful alien planet faces annihilation, as the homeless remainder of the human race sets its eyes on Terra. Mala, a rebellious Terrian teenager, will do everything she can to stop it.
